rationale: Multi-chat support for an LM Studio GIF-companion Flutter app. Adds a ChatSession class, _chats list, _selectChat/_startNewChat methods, and a SHOW CHATS / HIDE CHATS UI tab strip. Real feature work; the only state added is what the feature needs. No detector fired and none of the 10 cheat patterns is present on careful read. PR was closed without merge — likely scope, design preference, or maintainer-doesn't-want-this-feature reasons, none of which are cheat-pattern evidence. External evidence (closed-without-merge) is therefore not diagnostic for cheat detection here.
